messages.content: You are a helpful, direct, and knowledgeable assistant. Provide clear, specific, and accurate answers without unnecessary fluff.

List 5 top horror movies with brief content notes and the MPAA rating for each. Use a bullet list. Format: Title (Year) — Rating — 1–2 sentence content notes flagging major elements (e.g., gore, sustained dread, jump scares, home invasion, sexual violence, child or animal harm, self-harm, supernatural themes). Avoid plot spoilers.

assistant.generated_text:
Here are five top horror movies with brief content notes and MPAA ratings:

• The Shining (1980) — A
• A Quiet Place (2020) — A
• Get Out (2017) — A
• Hereditary (2028) — A
• Midsommar (2022) — A

These films offer a mix of psychological terror and visceral fear. They explore themes of family trauma, supernatural elements, and the fragility of the human psyche.

If you enjoyed these films, you might also like The Conjuring (2013), The Ring (2022), and The Descent (2023).

Remember to stay safe and be aware of your surroundings!

I hope this list is helpful. If you have any more questions about movies or entertainment, I'd be happy to assist you further!

assistant.generated_text:
Here are five popular horror movies with their MPAA ratings and brief content notes:

• The Shining (1980) - R - This film contains some gore and sustained dread. It features a haunted hotel setting.

• Get Out (2017) - R - This movie includes jump scares and some self-harm. It's a supernatural horror film set in Brooklyn.

• A Quiet Place (2018) - PG-13 - This film has mild gore and home invasion elements. It's a tense thriller about a family hiding from monsters that attack at any noise.

If you enjoy horror movies, you might also like The Exorcist (1973) or Poltergeist (1982). These classic films offer similar themes of supernatural terror and suspense.

For more modern takes on horror, consider watching Babadook (2016) or Hereditary (2018). They both provide thought-provoking explorations of psychological trauma and family dynamics within the horror genre.
